title: ChecklistProfile
description: Deterministic per-version profile written to profiles/profile-v<N>.json each time a dataset version is scored. The objective is a checklist of binary checks: each check reports a violation COUNT and a state. There is no weighted composite score; checks_passing_pct is a reporting headline only and never drives control flow.

checks_passing_pct.description: checks_passing / checks_total. Reporting headline ONLY — does not drive keep/revert.

total_violations.description: Sum of violations across all checks.

retention.description: unique_rows_kept / unique_rows_in_v0 (denominator is v0 deduplicated; cumulative).

checks.description: The compiled checklist with current state. One entry per check.

scope.description: Column name, list of columns, or 'rows' for whole-row checks.

severity.description: Priority tier; keys/required default to high.

violations.description: Count of violating cells or rows.

state.description: pass = 0 violations; open = fixable violations remain; residual = violations remain but unfixable within guardrails.

columns.description: Lightweight per-column stats that aid diagnosis (not themselves the checks).

variant_clusters.description: Suspected categorical variants that should fold to one canonical value.
